mechanisms.description: There is no public API to create a REST app or read back its client_id/secret — Developer Dashboard only (Apps & Credentials -> Create App). Once a human has done that, everything downstream is scriptable.
Post-bootstrap: mint short-lived access tokens from the pasted client pair via client_credentials.

methods.bootstrap: Create a REST app in the Developer Dashboard and copy the Client ID and Secret. Sandbox and live credentials are not interchangeable.

credentials.rotation: Secret can be regenerated in the Developer Dashboard.

scopes.notes: Scopes are granted per app in the dashboard and echoed in the token response; a 403 on a product API means valid token, missing product scope.

steps.description: Exchange the pasted client pair for a bearer access token.

gaps: App creation and secret read-back have no API at all — the browser dashboard is load-bearing.
The company's agentic-commerce positioning is ahead of its own onboarding: an agent cannot register a PayPal app.
